rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

formulas.taksit: faiz === 0 ? kredi / Math.max(1, vade) : kredi * ((faiz / 1200) / (1 - Math.pow(1 + faiz / 1200, -vade)))
formulas.kalanAnapara: faiz === 0 ? Math.max(0, kredi - (donem - 1) * (kredi / Math.max(1, vade))) : kredi * (Math.pow(1 + faiz / 1200, donem - 1) - Math.pow(1 + faiz / 1200, vade)) / (1 - Math.pow(1 + faiz / 1200, vade))
formulas.sonuc: faiz === 0 ? kredi / Math.max(1, vade) : kredi * Math.pow(1 + faiz / 1200, donem - 1) * (1 - 1 / (1 + faiz / 1200)) / (1 - Math.pow(1 + faiz / 1200, -vade)) / (faiz / 1200)

suggestedActions: Verify all property data with official documents.
Consult a mortgage broker for personalized rates.
